title: Dyspepsia (Indigestion)
subtitle: Understanding and managing persistent stomach discomfort
description: Clear, evidence-based information about dyspepsia (indigestion) — what causes it, how it is investigated, treatment options, and when to seek help. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

guidelines.title: Canadian Association of Gastroenterology Clinical Practice Guideline on the Management of Uninvestigated Dyspepsia
ACG and CAG Clinical Guideline: Management of Dyspepsia
Rome IV Diagnostic Criteria for Functional Gastrointestinal Disorders
